title: Passing Objects as Parameters in Java Methods
description: A flowchart illustrating how an object reference is passed to a method, demonstrating that the method operates on the original object's data, not a copy.
relationships: Calling method passes a copy of the object reference to the method parameter
Both the original variable and the method parameter point to the same object in memory
Method modifies the object's state through the reference
Calling method sees the changes made to the original object
